ogTitle: Moonan Flat vs Moonbah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonan Flat and Moonbah.
heading: Moonan Flat vs Moonbah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonan Flat, New South Wales and Moonbah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moonbah has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Moonan Flat (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonan Flat or Moonbah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonan Flat has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Moonbah scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonan Flat scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Moonbah scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonan Flat or Moonbah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moonbah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
